name: Thick & Hearty Pizza Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in garlic, oregano, tomato paste, and tomato sauce.
4. Simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and let cool completely before using.
6. Transfer any remaining sauce to an air-tight container and refrigerate or freeze.
